meaning: n.射手,弓术家,[天]人马星座
examples: Hundreds of occupational surnames are at once familiar to us, or at least recognizable after a little thought: Archer, Carter, Fisher, Mason, Thatcher, Taylor, to name but a few.
Hou Yi was the best archer at that time.
Hi, Professor Archer, you know how in class last week you said that you were looking for students who are interested in volunteering for your archeology project?
Archer has seen a guy get knocked out from a blow to the head by a crane arm.
Speaking outside the court, Roxie's mother Sophie Archer described Raftery as an "evil, controlling murderer".
